0.q: P5CS is the rate-limiting enzyme in proline biosynthesis in plants. Transgenic plants expressed higher levels of PvP5CS1 transcripts under salt stress conditions than under normal conditions.

1.q: P5CS is the rate-limiting enzyme in proline biosynthesis in plants. Transgenic plants expressed higher levels of PvP5CS2 transcripts under salt stress conditions than under normal conditions.

2.q: We previously cloned two full-length cDNAs, PvP5CS1 and PvP5CS2, for 1-pyrroline-5-carboxylate synthetase ... from common bean, Phaseolus vulgaris.
